creator: kenji@k2r.org
text:
Created attachment 187359
patch to files/postgresql.in to explicitly specify /usr/bin/su in the script

/usr/local/etc/rc.d/postgresql assumes the command "su" is unchanged, but some Port tools such as security/heimdal installs /usr/local/bin/su, which is at a higher precedence than /usr/bin/su, which causes an error when being called from the rc.d script.

A patch to solve this issue is attached, which explicitly specifies /usr/bin/su for the commands called from /usr/local/etc/rc.d/postgresql.
